description: MailerSend is a transactional messaging platform for sending and managing email and SMS, with features for domains, templates, inbound routing, webhooks, suppressions, analytics, and account management. It provides developer-focused APIs and tools alongside a web application for teams.
summary: MailerSend exposes a REST HTTP API at `https://api.mailersend.com/v1/`, a hosted MCP server at `https://mcp.mailersend.com/mcp`, and a `mailersend` CLI; the API and CLI accept MailerSend API tokens, while the CLI and MCP support OAuth-based login/connection flows.
